title: The 2026 AI Engineer Roadmap: 5 Production-Grade Projects

concepts.name: Edge AI with Small Language Models (SLM)
concepts.description: Offline-first mobile app using small language models with zero API costs and complete privacy. Covers lazy model loading, dynamic quantization (4-bit/8-bit based on device), sliding context window with semantic chunking, battery-aware inference batching, and encrypted offline-first sync.
concepts.example_scope: Desktop app that loads a quantized SLM, manages memory pressure, implements sliding context window with semantic similarity retention, and runs fully offline.

concepts.name: Self-Improving Coding Agent with Agentic Loops
concepts.description: Autonomous agent that writes code, runs tests, and learns from failures using a plan-execute-test-reflect cycle. Features circuit breaker pattern, sandboxed execution, 3-tier memory hierarchy (short-term/long-term/failure memory), vector-similarity-based reflection, and learning from past mistakes.
concepts.example_scope: Agent that receives a coding task, generates code, executes in sandbox, runs tests, reflects on failures using past failure memory, and iterates until tests pass or circuit breaker triggers.

concepts.name: Multimodal AI Video Editor Agent
concepts.description: AI agent integrated into a video editor that understands editing intent. Translates natural language ('make this cinematic') into concrete editing parameters. Uses vision+audio models for scene analysis, generates Edit Decision Lists before execution, implements incremental preview rendering, and provides reasoning for every edit.
concepts.example_scope: CLI tool or web app that takes a video + natural language instruction, analyzes scenes, generates an Edit Decision List, and applies edits with explainable reasoning.

concepts.name: Personal Life OS with Deep Context & Privacy-First Architecture
concepts.description: Deeply personal agent managing calendar, finances, and health with continuous context building via a personal knowledge graph. Features proactive monitoring (6-hour cycles), value alignment validation, local-first encrypted data, predictive planning from historical patterns, and memory consolidation with decay.
concepts.example_scope: Agent that ingests calendar + health data, builds a personal knowledge graph, detects burnout patterns (high meeting density + low sleep), and makes proactive recommendations aligned with stated priorities.

concepts.name: Autonomous Enterprise Workflow Agent with Multi-Agent Orchestration
concepts.description: Production-grade agent that runs business workflows end-to-end. Event-driven architecture monitoring Slack/Jira/email, workflow orchestration with parallel step execution, multi-agent delegation (communication/data/analysis/documentation agents), self-healing with circuit breakers, immutable audit trail, RBAC, full observability, HITL for critical workflows, and cost management.
concepts.example_scope: Multi-agent system that monitors a Slack channel for workflow triggers, orchestrates subtasks across specialist agents, maintains audit logs, and includes human-in-the-loop gates for high-risk actions.

concepts.name: Three-Tier Memory Architecture Pattern
concepts.description: Cross-cutting pattern appearing in multiple projects: short-term memory (current task context), long-term memory (indexed successful patterns), and failure memory (error signatures with solutions). Includes memory consolidation with decay and vector-similarity retrieval.
concepts.example_scope: Standalone memory module with short-term buffer, long-term vector store, and failure index that can be plugged into any agent system.

concepts.name: Circuit Breaker & Self-Healing Patterns for AI Agents
concepts.description: Production resilience patterns: circuit breaker to stop infinite agentic loops, exponential backoff for transient failures, max iteration limits with state persistence for resumption, and self-healing mechanisms that decide between retry vs escalation.
concepts.example_scope: Reusable circuit breaker module that wraps any agentic loop, tracks consecutive failures, persists state for resumption, and escalates when threshold is exceeded.

cross_cutting_themes.insight: Every project emphasizes sophisticated memory - from sliding context windows to personal knowledge graphs. Memory is the differentiator between toys and systems.
Production systems require human oversight gates. Confidence-based escalation and explicit approval for high-risk actions appear repeatedly.
Every recommendation must include reasoning. 'Why did you do this?' should always be answerable with citations to data.
Production AI must manage compute, memory, battery, and token budgets. Optimization is not optional.
Encryption at rest, user-controlled keys, RBAC, sandboxing - security is architectural, not an afterthought.

questions_for_hitl: Which concepts are most relevant to your current work or learning goals?
Should we focus on the cross-cutting patterns (C6, C7) or a specific project (C1-C5)?
